HGSS.533.0000:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi! Do you like Pokémon?\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Uh, no, I just asked you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Huh? You’re strange!\f
HGSS.533.0001:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi. You must like
Pokémon.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: No, not me. I asked you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Pardon? You’re weird!\f
HGSS.533.0002:
Copycat: Hmm? Quit mimicking?
But that’s my main hobby!\f
HGSS.533.0003:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi! I heard that you
lost your cherished Poké Doll.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: If I find it, you’ll give
me a Magnet Train Pass?\f
[0103,0000,0000]: I’ll go find it for you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: You think you lost it
when you went to Vermilion City?\f
HGSS.533.0004:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi! I heard that you
lost your cherished Poké Doll.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: If I find it, you’ll give
me a Magnet Train Pass?\f
[0103,0000,0000]: I’ll go find it for you.\f
[0103,0000,0000]: You think you lost it
when you went to Vermilion City?\f
HGSS.533.0005:
Copycat: Pardon?\f
I shouldn’t decide what you should do?\f
But I’m really worried...
What if someone finds it?\f
HGSS.533.0006:
Copycat: Yay! That’s my CLEFAIRY
Poké Doll!\f
See the tear where the right arm is
sewn on? That’s proof!\f
OK. I’ll give you this Magnet Train Pass
as I promised!\f
HGSS.533.0008:
Copycat: You show it at the ticket
gate to get on the Magnet Train.\f
The rail-company man gave me that
when they tore down our old house\r
for the station.
HGSS.533.0009:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi!
Thanks a lot for the Magnet Train Pass!\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Pardon?\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Is it that fun to mimic
my every move?\f
HGSS.533.0010:
[0103,0000,0000]: Hi!
Thanks a lot for the Magnet Train Pass!\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Pardon?\f
[0103,0000,0000]: Is it that fun to mimic
my every move?\f
HGSS.533.0011: Copycat: You bet! It’s a scream!\f
HGSS.533.0012:
This Poké Doll looks just like the
real thing...\f
Aw! It moved!
It’s a real BANETTE!
HGSS.533.0014:
This is a flowerlike Poké Doll...
It is a CHERRIM Poké Doll!
HGSS.533.0015:
This is a nose-like Poké Doll...
It is a NOSEPASS Poké Doll!
HGSS.533.0016:
It’s a CLEFAIRY!
Huh?\f
Oh, right. It’s a CLEFAIRY Poké Doll.
HGSS.533.0017:
It’s a CLEFAIRY Poké Doll.\f
It has a tear where the right arm
was sewn on.
